sources.name: Codex Desktop quota snapshot
sources.notes: Best-effort local rate-limit snapshot from Codex Desktop session logs. No API key is required; values may lag the UI.

sources.name: DeepSeek balance
sources.notes: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is a DeepSeek platform API key. This prepaid source reports current balance, not usage.

sources.name: GitHub Copilot premium requests (user)
sources.notes: Tracks the premium request usage shown under GitHub Settings > Copilot. The default included allowance is 300 for Copilot Pro; override with GITHUB_COPILOT_PREMIUM_REQUEST_ALLOWANCE.

sources.name: GitHub Copilot premium requests (org)
sources.notes: Optional. GITHUB_ORG is only needed if you want organization Copilot premium request usage; personal developers can leave it empty.

sources.name: Gemini BigQuery billing budget
sources.notes: Uses BigQuery Cloud Billing export to calculate spent and remaining balance from TOTAL_BUDGET. Service account needs BigQuery Job User and BigQuery Data Viewer access.
